! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Meta
! Description: Domain set for Meta traffic routing.
! Author: Harry (https://github.com/harryheros)
! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova
! License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0
! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-28 00:14:00 UTC
! Total: 10
! Breakdown: service_rules=10

! Meta / Instagram / Facebook
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||facebook.com^                           ! Facebook - main platform
||fbcdn.net^                              ! Facebook CDN
||fb.com^                                 ! Facebook - short domain
||fb.me^                                  ! Facebook - short links
||instagram.com^                          ! Instagram
||cdninstagram.com^                       ! Instagram CDN
||threads.net^                            ! Threads (Meta)
||messenger.com^                          ! Messenger
||meta.com^                               ! Meta - corporate
||oculus.com^                             ! Oculus VR (Meta)
